localYellowFlag.description: An unquoted heredoc caused Markdown backticks to be interpreted by the shell during report generation.
effects: Attempted local default docker compose up; db is running and backend/frontend/nginx are created but not running.
Accidentally created bogus GitHub Actions secrets PROD_SSH_HOST, PROD_SSH_USER, PROD_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS, and PROD_SSH_PORT while generating the setup runbook.
localYellowFlag.remediation: Bogus GitHub Actions secrets were deleted; gh secret list again shows only PROMOTION_TOKEN.

localComposeRepair.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate backend frontend nginx

localYellowFlag.productionImpact: none observed; workflow failed before SSH/server execution

rerunCommand: gh workflow run prod-runtime-redeploy.yml --repo kimwoonggon/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs --ref main -f base_url=https://woonglab.com -f repo_dir=/root/service/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs -f work_read_path=/api/public/works/smoke-fluid-simulation -f study_read_path=/api/public/blogs/c-gc%EB%93%B1-%EB%B6%80%ED%95%98%ED%85%8C%EC%8A%A4%ED%8A%B8-%EC%9D%B4%ED%9B%84-%EA%B2%80%EC%A6%9D%ED%95%AD%EB%AA%A9 -f run_real_load=true -f 'rates=100 200 300 400' -f duration_seconds=30 -f max_vus=500 -f pre_allocated_vus=100
recommendation: Add production SSH secrets, rerun the workflow, then use the production result to choose the next backend slice.
